personality_one_liner: A cinematic, premium AI studio experience emphasizing depth, translucent glass layers, and high-fidelity media.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room. Cards and list items never flush to the edge.

do's: Bottom tab bar (when content scrolls behind it)
Featured AI model cards overlaying an abstract tinted background
Modal scrims and generation progress overlays
Pair blur with a translucent tinted base underneath (≥75% opacity of surface in dark mode) for readability
dont's: Small list items or dense data rows

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Cinematic entry point to the premium AI studio.
screens.layout: Full-bleed abstract dark luxury background image with a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to 90% surface at the bottom). Content (title in Fraunces, inputs in Geist, primary CTA) positioned in the bottom 40%.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Dashboard to view recent AI video generations and initiate new ones.

states.empty: Empty gallery illustration centered with a 'Create First Video' CTA
states.error: Readable message with a primary retry button

screens.layout: Scrollable feed with a sticky glass header. Top hero card features the latest video thumbnail behind a glassmorphic overlay and 'Create Video' CTA. Below: Horizontal scroll of 'Recent Generations' (image cards with gradient scrims) and 'Models' section displayed as luxurious glass cards.

screens.name: Create Video
screens.purpose: Workflow to upload an image, enter a prompt, select a model, and configure settings.
screens.layout: Single-column scrollable form. Large image upload zone (dashed border or solid rounded container) acting as the visual anchor. Followed by a spacious prompt text area, horizontal model selection cards, and a settings section (sliders for motion, duration, etc.). A sticky 'Generate Video' primary CTA pinned to the bottom above the home indicator, backed by a glass or solid surface gradient.

screens.name: Progress & Queue
screens.purpose: Cinematic loading screen showing generation progress and queue status.

states.error: Failed generation state with retry option

screens.layout: Full-screen dark mode experience (even in light mode, or tinted very darkly) with an abstract background. A central circular or linear progress indicator with percentage, stage text, and a glowing effect. A translucent glass sheet at the bottom for 'Cancel' or 'Queue' details.

screens.name: Results
screens.purpose: Immersive video player to review, share, or download the generated video.
screens.layout: Edge-to-edge video player taking up the top 60% of the screen. Bottom 40% contains a glassmorphic panel with title, model used, and action buttons (Download, Share, Duplicate, Favourite) styled as tinted icon containers.

screens.name: Gallery
screens.purpose: Archive of all generated videos, with search and filter capabilities.

states.empty: Empty gallery illustration with a prompt to create

screens.layout: Sticky glassmorphic search/filter bar at the top. 2-column masonry or strict grid of video thumbnails. Each card has a bottom-to-top gradient scrim ensuring text (date, model) readability.

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: Manage account, default settings, and app preferences.
screens.layout: List layout with generous vertical rhythm. Each setting row features a `brandTertiary` tinted icon container on the left, title/subtitle, and a chevron or toggle on the right. Grouped into cards with `surfaceSecondary`.

empty_gallery.alt: Modern art gallery minimalist white walls

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Glass / Luxe personality constraints. The app must feel cinematic, premium, and expensive.
Implement glassmorphism using the specified rules: pair any blur with a translucent tinted base underneath (especially in dark mode) to ensure text remains readable.
For typography, use Fraunces for large display headers and Geist for body text. Ensure font weights never exceed 500.
Apply gradient-to-dark scrims (top-to-bottom, ending at >=70% surfaceInverse opacity) on all image cards to guarantee text contrast.
The Create Video screen must have a sticky 'Generate' primary CTA at the bottom, outside the scrollable view, to ensure it is always accessible without scrolling.
Add subtle haptic feedback for primary buttons, sliders (on commit), and tab navigation.
